designVersion.label: New look (classic available for a limited time)

designVersionUpgrade.title: A fresh new Alkemio is here
designVersionUpgrade.body:
We're rolling out a new design that's faster, clearer, and built for what's next. You're invited to switch now.

If you prefer the classic look, it'll stay available from your avatar menu for a limited time - and if something is missing, please let support know so we can carry it over before the classic design retires.
designVersionUpgrade.confirm: Take me to the new design
